[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00011110 4
4 10011000 3
5 00000001 1
6 00100101 3
7 11110000 4

01 01111111 7
12 11111110 7

70 11101111 7
